description_long: This kiosk features a modern, boxy design with a flat, wood-textured roof that extends beyond the main structure, creating a prominent overhang. The front facade includes a large glass window and a recessed entryway, both framed by the same wood finish as the roof. The side walls are primarily smooth and white, with one side displaying two small rectangular windows. The base of the kiosk is set on a patterned tile platform, adding visual interest and a sense of permanence. A bold, horizontal sign reading 'RIYADH MODERN' is attached to the front, serving as clear branding. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern kiosk with a flat wood-textured roof, large glass window, recessed entry, and bold 'RIYADH MODERN' signage on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing two small rectangular windows on a smooth white wall and the wood-textured overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large glass window, recessed entryway, tiled platform, and prominent 'RIYADH MODERN' sign.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood-textured surface with the sign partially visible to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid white wall and the wood-textured roof overhang, no windows or doors visible.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign, horizontally mounted at the front base, displaying 'RIYADH MODERN' in bold letters.
attribute_window_presence: Three windows: one large rectangular glass window at the front, two small rectangular windows on the left side.
attribute_door_configuration: Single recessed entryway at the front, likely a sliding or hinged glass door.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a wood-textured finish and significant overhang on all sides.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with clean lines and wood accents.
